name: bopscrk
title: bopscrk
description:
Generate smart and powerful wordlists
Targeted-attack wordlist creator: introduce personal info related to target,
combines every word and transforms results into possible passwords. The
lyricpass module allows one to search lyrics related to artists and include
them to the wordlists.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use bopscrk because Generate smart and powerful wordlists.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use bopscrk as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `bopscrk [options] [args]` as documented upstream for bopscrk.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair bopscrk with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `bopscrk --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
